verses.text: At Iconium many believe; the unbelieving stir up trouble; they speak boldly, with signs. Bold witness. God confirms the word amid opposition.
At Iconium many believe; the unbelieving stir up trouble; they speak boldly, with signs. Bold witness. God confirms the word amid opposition.
At Iconium many believe; the unbelieving stir up trouble; they speak boldly, with signs. Bold witness. God confirms the word amid opposition.
The city divided, they flee an assault to Lystra and preach. Pressing on. Driven out, they carry the gospel further.
The city divided, they flee an assault to Lystra and preach. Pressing on. Driven out, they carry the gospel further.
The city divided, they flee an assault to Lystra and preach. Pressing on. Driven out, they carry the gospel further.
The city divided, they flee an assault to Lystra and preach. Pressing on. Driven out, they carry the gospel further.
A cripple from birth hears Paul; 'Stand upright'; he leaps and walks. Mighty healing. Faith and power bring the man to his feet.
A cripple from birth hears Paul; 'Stand upright'; he leaps and walks. Mighty healing. Faith and power bring the man to his feet.
A cripple from birth hears Paul; 'Stand upright'; he leaps and walks. Mighty healing. Faith and power bring the man to his feet.
The people cry, 'The gods are come down,' and would sacrifice to them. Misplaced worship. They mistake the messengers for gods.
The people cry, 'The gods are come down,' and would sacrifice to them. Misplaced worship. They mistake the messengers for gods.
The people cry, 'The gods are come down,' and would sacrifice to them. Misplaced worship. They mistake the messengers for gods.
They rend their clothes, 'we also are men of like passions'; turn from these vanities to the living God. Honest refusal. They will take no glory due to God.
They rend their clothes, 'we also are men of like passions'; turn from these vanities to the living God. Honest refusal. They will take no glory due to God.
God left not Himself without witness, giving rain and 'fruitful seasons.' Witness in nature. God's goodness testifies of Him to all.
God left not Himself without witness, giving rain and 'fruitful seasons.' Witness in nature. God's goodness testifies of Him to all.
God left not Himself without witness, giving rain and 'fruitful seasons.' Witness in nature. God's goodness testifies of Him to all.
Jews stone Paul and drag him out as dead; he rises and enters the city. Unstoppable. God raises His servant to keep working.
Jews stone Paul and drag him out as dead; he rises and enters the city. Unstoppable. God raises His servant to keep working.
Returning, they confirm the disciples, 'we must through much tribulation enter... the kingdom,' and ordain elders. Honest warning. The way to glory passes through trial.
Returning, they confirm the disciples, 'we must through much tribulation enter... the kingdom,' and ordain elders. Honest warning. The way to glory passes through trial.
Returning, they confirm the disciples, 'we must through much tribulation enter... the kingdom,' and ordain elders. Honest warning. The way to glory passes through trial.
They return to Antioch, whence they were sent for the work. Mission's end. They come back to the church that sent them.
They return to Antioch, whence they were sent for the work. Mission's end. They come back to the church that sent them.
They return to Antioch, whence they were sent for the work. Mission's end. They come back to the church that sent them.
They rehearse how God 'had opened the door of faith unto the Gentiles.' Glad report. They give God the glory for the harvest.
They rehearse how God 'had opened the door of faith unto the Gentiles.' Glad report. They give God the glory for the harvest.
